channel.title: Perforce — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Perforce (perforce).

item.title: CVE-2026-14254 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts in Delphix Continuous Data
item.description: A race condition in the account lockout mechanism in Delphix Continous Data allowed the lockout threshold to be bypassed through concurrent authentication requests. Parallel login attempts were processed before the failed-login counter and lockout st…

item.title: CVE-2026-8804 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information for Puppet Resource API
item.description: Puppet resource_api (shipped in Puppet Core 8.x and Puppet Enterprise 2023.8.x and 2025.x) does not preserve the sensitive flag on parameters defined via the resource-api, causing values such as passwords to be stored in cleartext in the agent's loca…

item.title: CVE-2026-6902 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Code Injection in Perforce P4 (Helix Core)
item.description: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in P4 (Helix Core) Server's Command-Line Client, prior to the 2025.2 Patch 2, has been fixed to address potential security risks.

item.title: CVE-2026-8654 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation in Delphix Continuous Data connectors allows an authenticated user to execute arbitrary operating system commands on the staging or target host.

item.title: CVE-2026-6043 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Insecure Default Configuration in P4 Server
item.description: P4 Server versions prior to 2026.1 are configured with insecure default settings that, when exposed to untrusted networks, allow unauthenticated attackers to create arbitrary user accounts, enumerate existing users, authenticate to accounts with no p…

item.title: CVE-2025-14591 · 5.3 MEDIUM — PII Leak Due to Change in EOR Handling
item.description: In Delphix Continuous Compliance version 2025.3.0 and later, following a recent bug fix to correctly handle CR+LF (Windows and DOS) End-of-Record (EOR) characters in delimited files, an issue was identified: using an incorrect EOR configuration can c…

item.title: CVE-2025-13472 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Missing authorization in BlazeMeter Jenkins Plugin
item.description: A fix was made in BlazeMeter Jenkins Plugin version 4.27 to allow users only with certain permissions to see the list of available resources like credential IDs, bzm workspaces and bzm project Ids. Prior to this fix, anyone could see this list as a d…

item.title: CVE-2025-10360 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Insufficiently Protected Credentials in Puppet Enterprise 2025.4 and 2025.5
item.description: In Puppet Enterprise versions 2025.4.0 and 2025.5, the encryption key used for encrypting content in the Infra Assistant database was not excluded from the files gathered by Puppet backup. The key is only present on the system if the user has a Puppe…

item.title: CVE-2025-5459 · 8.6 HIGH — OS Command Injection
item.description: A user with specific node group editing permissions and a specially crafted class parameter could be used to execute commands as root on the primary host. It affects Puppet Enterprise versions 2018.1.8 through 2023.8.3 and 2025.3 and has been resolve…

item.title: CVE-2025-2903 · 8.5 HIGH — Privilege Chaining in Delphix
item.description: An attacker with knowledge of creating user accounts during VM deployment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using the OS Login feature, can login via SSH gaining command-line control of the operating system. This allows an attacker to gain access to sen…

item.title: CVE-2025-3113 · 9 CRITICAL — Improper Access Control in Delphix Masking Engine
item.description: A valid, authenticated user with sufficient privileges and who is aware of Continuous Compliance’s internal database configurations can leverage the application’s built-in Connector functionality to access Continuous Compliance’s internal database. T…

item.title: CVE-2024-11084 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Potential Username Enumeration in Helix ALM
item.description: Helix ALM prior to 2025.1 returns distinct error responses during authentication, allowing an attacker to determine whether a username exists.

item.title: CVE-2025-1714 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Username Enumeration in Gliffy
item.description: Lack of Rate Limiting in Sign-up workflow in Perforce Gliffy prior to version 4.14.0-7 on Gliffy online allows attacker to enumerate valid user emails and potentially DOS the server

item.title: CVE-2024-5174 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Broken Authentication in Gliffy
item.description: A flaw in Gliffy results in broken authentication through the reset functionality of the application.

item.title: CVE-2024-7141 · 5.9 MEDIUM — CSRF in Gliffy
item.description: Versions of Gliffy Online prior to versions 4.14.0-7 contains a Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) flaw.

item.title: CVE-2021-27017 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Deserialization of untrusted data
item.description: Utilization of a module presented a security risk by allowing the deserialization of untrusted/user supplied data. This is resolved in the Puppet Agent 7.4.0 release.

item.title: CVE-2024-10315 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Insecure Configuration in Gliffy Online
item.description: In Gliffy Online an insecure configuration was discovered in versions before 4.14.0-6. Reported by Alpha Inferno PVT LTD.

item.title: CVE-2024-10314 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial of Service via Auto Generation Function
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2024.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the auto-generation function was identified. Reported by Karol Więsek.

item.title: CVE-2024-10344 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial of Service via Refuse Function
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2024.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the refuse function was identified. Reported by Karol Więsek.

item.title: CVE-2024-10345 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Denial of Service via Shutdown Function
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2024.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the shutdown function was identified. Reported by Karol Więsek.

item.title: CVE-2024-9129 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Format String Injection in Zend Server
item.description: In versions of Zend Server 8.5 and prior to version 9.2 a format string injection was discovered. Reported by Dylan Marino

item.title: CVE-2024-9160 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Security Misconfiguration in Forge module PEADM
item.description: In versions of the PEADM Forge Module prior to 3.24.0 a security misconfiguration was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2024-8067 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Unicode "best fit" argument injection
item.description: In versions of Helix Core prior to 2024.1 Patch 2 (2024.1/2655224) a Windows ANSI API Unicode "best fit" argument injection was identified.

item.title: CVE-2024-3930 · 6.3 MEDIUM — XML External Entity in Akana
item.description: In versions of Akana API Platform prior to 2024.1.0 a flaw resulting in XML External Entity (XXE) was discovered.

item.title: CVE-2024-5250 · 3.5 LOW — Overly Verbose Errors in SAML Integration
item.description: In versions of Akana API Platform prior to 2024.1.0 overly verbose errors can be found in SAML integrations

item.title: CVE-2024-5249 · 5.4 MEDIUM — SAML Replay in Akana
item.description: In versions of Akana API Platform prior to 2024.1.0, SAML tokens can be replayed.

item.title: CVE-2024-6727 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Broken Access Control in Delphix
item.description: A flaw in versions of Delphix Data Control Tower (DCT) prior to 19.0.0 results in broken authentication through the enable-scale-testing functionality of the application.

item.title: CVE-2024-6726 · 8.8 HIGH — Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Delphix
item.description: Versions of Delphix Engine prior to Release 25.0.0.0 contain a flaw which results in Remote Code Execution (RCE).

item.title: CVE-2024-3826 · 8.6 HIGH — Broken SAML Validation
item.description: In versions of Akana in versions prior to and including 2022.1.3 validation is broken when using the SAML Single Sign-On (SSO) functionality.

item.title: CVE-2024-3995 · 2 LOW — Command Injection in Helix ALM
item.description: In Helix ALM versions prior to 2024.2.0, a local command injection was identified. Reported by Bryan Riggins.

item.title: CVE-2024-2796 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SSRF in Akana API Platform
item.description: A server-side request forgery (SSRF) was discovered in the Akana API Platform in versions prior to and including 2022.1.3. Reported by Jakob Antonsson.

item.title: CVE-2024-3825 · 4.3 MEDIUM — CSRF in BlazeMeter Jenkins plugin
item.description: Versions of the BlazeMeter Jenkins plugin prior to 4.22 contain a flaw which results in credential enumeration

item.title: CVE-2024-0325 · 3.6 LOW — Command Injection in Helix Sync
item.description: In Helix Sync versions prior to 2024.1, a local command injection was identified. Reported by Bryan Riggins.

item.title: CVE-2023-5759 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Denial-of-Service via Buffer in Helix Core
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2023.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the buffer was identified. Reported by Jason Geffner.

item.title: CVE-2023-45319 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Denial-of-Service (Commit) in Helix Core
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2023.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the commit function was identified. Reported by Jason Geffner.

item.title: CVE-2023-45849 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Arbitrary Code Execution in Helix Core
item.description: An arbitrary code execution which results in privilege escalation was discovered in Helix Core versions prior to 2023.2. Reported by Jason Geffner.

item.title: CVE-2023-35767 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Remote Denial-of-Service via Shutdown Function in Helix Core
item.description: In Helix Core versions prior to 2023.2, an unauthenticated remote Denial of Service (DoS) via the shutdown function was identified. Reported by Jason Geffner.

item.title: CVE-2023-5309 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Broken Session Management in Puppet Enterprise
item.description: Versions of Puppet Enterprise prior to 2021.7.6 and 2023.5 contain a flaw which results in broken session management for SAML implementations.

item.title: CVE-2023-2530
item.description: A privilege escalation allowing remote code execution was discovered in the orchestration service.
